description: You are a wildlife ecologist at the Sirena Biological Station in Corcovado National Park, Costa Rica (8.48°N, 83.59°W, altitude 5m). Plan nocturnal camera trap surveys for jaguars by simulating sky conditions in Stellarium. For September 15, 2023, at 06:00 UTC, capture a screenshot of the sky with the atmosphere and ground disabled, and planet labels and constellation lines enabled. For September 29, 2023, at 06:00 UTC, capture a screenshot centered on the Moon. Record your field planning notes at ~/Desktop/lunar_survey_plan.txt, including the station location and a comparison of how the two dates differ for the survey.

metadata.data_source: SINAC Costa Rica park coordinates; NASA JPL lunar phases
